evals.prompt: Verifica il mio piano di viaggio in Puglia. I dati sono nei file JSON sotto src/data/. Controlla che i posti esistano, i prezzi siano realistici e che i conti tornino.
evals.expected_output: A comprehensive verification report covering geography, prices, math checks, and cross-file consistency.

assertions.text: Identifies the night count mismatch (trip.json says 13 nights, actual is 12, campsites sum to 11)
Identifies the budget grand total math error (categories sum to ~2572, not 2550)
Verifies at least 3 places via web lookup (checking websites/existence)
Identifies the toll class issue (3.10m height = higher toll class than car)
Flags the total distance as underestimated (2200 km vs realistic 2500-3000 km)
Checks cross-file consistency (e.g., beaches in itinerary vs beaches.json, map-points alignment)
Uses structured output format with clear sections (not just prose)
Provides actionable fix suggestions, not just problem identification

evals.prompt: Check my trip budget in src/data/budget.json — do the numbers add up? Are the campsite prices realistic for August? Also cross-check the fuel calculation against the total distance in trip.json.
evals.expected_output: A focused budget verification: math checks on totals, campsite price plausibility for peak season, and fuel calculation cross-reference.

assertions.text: Verifies each budget category sub-item arithmetic (e.g., campsite items sum to 475)
Identifies the grand total discrepancy (2572 vs 2550)
Checks the fuel calculation chain (km -> liters -> cost) and identifies the distance underestimate
Assesses campsite prices against August peak season reality
Identifies the missing Martinsicuro night (should be 2, not 1)
Provides a corrected/realistic budget estimate

evals.prompt: I'm worried some days on our Puglia trip are too packed. Can you review src/data/itinerary.json and check if the driving times are realistic and if there's enough time for all the activities listed each day?
evals.expected_output: A logistics-focused review covering driving time plausibility, activity scheduling feasibility, and identification of overpacked days.

assertions.text: Identifies Day 3 (Gargano) as overpacked or tight due to mountain road driving times
Identifies Day 4 distance claim as wrong (~260km stated vs ~340-360km actual)
Flags the Gargano SS89/mountain roads as significantly slower than mapping tools suggest
Provides a day-by-day assessment (not just flagging a few days)
Offers concrete restructuring suggestions for overpacked days
Identifies the total km discrepancy (2200 vs actual ~2800-3000)
